package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "log/slog"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for logger_created_per_request: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `zap.NewProduction()` or `logrus.New()` inside handler functions
type CaseLoggerCreatedPerRequestDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseLoggerCreatedPerRequestModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseLoggerCreatedPerRequestRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseLoggerCreatedPerRequestModel
}

type CaseLoggerCreatedPerRequestService struct {
    repo *CaseLoggerCreatedPerRequestRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseLoggerCreatedPerRequestAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeLoggerCreatedPerRequest(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseLoggerCreatedPerRequestDTO) error {
    focus := "logger_created_per_request"
    _ = focus
    slog.InfoContext(ctx, "handled", "rule", "logger_created_per_request")
    logger_created_per_request_negative := map[string]int{"logger": 1, "created": 2, "per": 3, "request": 4}
    logger_created_per_request_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    logger_negative_0 := logger_created_per_request_negative["logger"] + len(input)
    _ = logger_negative_0
    created_negative_1 := logger_created_per_request_negative["created"] + len(input)
    _ = created_negative_1
    for per_negative_2Index, item := range items { logger_created_per_request_negative[item.ID] = per_negative_2Index }
    request_negative_3 := logger_created_per_request_negative["request"] + len(input)
    _ = request_negative_3
    return nil
}
